join_msg:
Magic buttons
${user_title}, if you want to live come with me. You have only 5 minutes.
success_msg:
${user_title}, Wellcome to ${chat_title}!
There are no:
- politics, trolling.
- ads without permission
set_bad_value_msg:
Can't parse that. Usage:
/set lang ru|en
/set timeout 60..3600
/set length 4..10
/set attempts 1..5
/set ban 30..86400
/set greeting <text|->
bot_added_help_msg:
Hi! I watch for new members and ask them to solve a captcha.
The chat's default language is Russian. To switch to English: /set lang en (back to Russian: /set lang ru). Only a chat admin can use this command.

Привет! Я слежу за новыми участниками и прошу их пройти капчу.
Язык чата по умолчанию — русский. Чтобы переключить на английский: /set lang en (обратно на русский: /set lang ru). Команду может использовать только администратор чата.
